metadata.description: SMO Ops Brain Marketplace. Universal Layer A plugins for SMO-AI Customer Onboarding system. Phase 1 Input Capture available now. Phase 2-5 plus cockpit and plugin-creator coming.

plugins.name: smo-ai-onboarding
plugins.description: SMO-AI Customer Onboarding Plugin. Phase 1 Input Capture with 6 sub-skills (mini-intake, source extraction, memory mining, files request, interview, validator). MENA-optimized with bilingual EN/AR, Khaleeji dialect handling, Telegram operator approval. Includes Acme-MENATech synthetic test fixture.
